title: FlevoMods
description: A personalized optimization-focused modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and let you enjoy shaders smoothly on any PC or laptop.
body:
FlevoMods is a carefully customized performance and optimization modpack built to make Minecraft run smoother and look better — even on low-end systems.
It focuses on maximizing FPS, reducing all forms of lag, and allowing players to use shaders without performance drops.

🧩 Key Features

BetterF3 – A cleaner, more organized debug screen that replaces Minecraft’s default F3 menu full of cluttered text.

Shader Support – Comes with a beautiful shader pack optimized to run smoothly on almost any computer.

Performance Mods – Includes multiple optimization mods that significantly improve FPS and stability.

Flashback – Review your past builds and see your creations from previous sessions.

Zoomify – Zoom in and explore the world from a distance.

Sound Physics Remastered – Makes sounds more realistic and immersive, enhancing the overall experience.

Custom Sound Control – Adjust or replace any Minecraft sound effect to your liking — perfect for personalized experiences.

⚙️ Performance and Experience

FlevoMods is all about balance: great visuals, better sound, and smooth gameplay.
Whether you’re exploring, building, or using shaders, you’ll notice faster performance and reduced lag — without sacrificing beauty or immersion.

🌍 Notes

This modpack is mainly optimized for smooth gameplay but can also be used with servers.
It does not contain any inappropriate or NSFW content.
You can use it for both private and public play.
